description: Manifest for all mock JSON fixtures in /public/data. Maps each file to its owning business module(s) as declared in backend/.ref/docs/DOMAIN_MODULES_BLUEPRINT.md. Cross-cutting fixtures list every module that consumes them.

modules.Foundation: Shared base every module sits on. No JSON - infrastructure only.
modules.Tenancy: The academy boundary - identifies tenant from subdomain, isolates data.
modules.Attributes: Dynamic attribute system for sport-specific fields.
modules.Documents & Media: Central file storage: virus scan, signed URLs, OCR, expiry.
modules.Search: Global search + list filtering. No JSON - infrastructure.
modules.Offline Sync & Mobile: Sync engine for offline-first mobile flows.
modules.Staff & HR: Internal people - profiles, pay, visa/legal, docs.
modules.Reception & Front Desk: Walk-ins, day passes, wristbands, approval queue.
modules.Feature Flags: Per-tenant feature flag runtime (Pennant + composition over entitlements).
modules.Sport Registry: Shared, code-based catalogue of sport behaviour.
modules.Seasons & Registration: Real season boundaries with windows + cutoffs.
modules.Teams (sports view): Roster + staffing operations on top of the structural team.
modules.Coaching: Sports-domain view of a coach - assignments, certs, availability.
modules.Enrollment & Waitlist: Public sign-up to trial to offer to enrol funnel.
modules.Training: Recurring practice sessions with session plans.
modules.Matches: Competitive fixtures - squad, lineup, results, recap.
modules.Attendance: On-field capture (offline / NFC / QR) + review workflow.
modules.Competition: Leagues and knockouts - fixtures, standings, brackets.
modules.Messaging: Direct conversations between coach, admin, parent.
modules.Finance - Billing & Payments: Money-in - invoices, ledger, refunds, credit memos.
modules.Recurring Membership & Subscriptions: Family memberships - one per child, one payer.

_manifest.json.description: This file - index of every mock fixture and its owning module(s).

SHARED_IDS.md.description: Canonical ID prefix registry. Every ID prefix and every cross-cutting canonical ID is declared here.

NAMING_CONVENTION.md.description: File-naming rules, ID conventions, and how to add a new fixture.

tenants.json.description: Every tenant that can be switched to via the workspace picker.

business-types.json.description: Business-type catalogue (academy, gym, activity_center) with default_config.

workspaces.json.description: Cross-tenant workspaces the current user is a member of.

users.json.description: Every tenant user - owner, admin, coaches, reception, finance, medical, parents/guardians.

me.json.description: GET /auth/me payload - self, tenants, scopes, features, entitlements, subscription.

demo-users.json.description: Demo/seed user list for the tenant onboarding sandbox.

login.json.description: Login response shape - sample tokens and cookies.

login-history.json.description: Login attempts and outcomes for risk/audit.

grants.json.description: Scoped grants - role x scope x expiry per user.

mfa-methods.json.description: TOTP, FIDO2, SMS, passkey, recovery methods with lifecycle states.

api-keys.json.description: Organization/service API keys - active, rotated, revoked, suspended.

invitations.json.description: Invite links - pending, accepted, expired, revoked.

subscription.json.description: Platform subscription state per tenant - trialing, active, past_due, paused, canceled.

plan-grants.json.description: Entitlement grants tied to each plan tier.

entitlement-licenses.json.description: Per-tenant entitlement licenses (slots, pools, feature toggles) with usage snapshots.

attribute-sets.json.description: Attribute sets bound to entity types (e.g. athlete_enrollment x football), with groups and typed attributes.

documents.json.description: Documents/media - receipts, medical, contracts. Signed access, virus-scan status.

athlete-documents.json.description: Documents attached to athletes - passport, medical, ID with expiry.

staff-documents.json.description: Documents attached to staff - visa, right-to-work, insurance with expiry.

notification-templates.json.description: Per-locale template bodies for push/email/SMS/WhatsApp notifications.

notifications.json.description: Delivered notifications feed across channels + statuses.

notification-preferences.json.description: Per-user channel opt-ins and mute preferences.

integrations.json.description: Third-party connectors - QuickBooks, Google Calendar, Zoom, WhatsApp Business.

webhook-endpoints.json.description: Outbound webhook endpoints per tenant with event subscriptions.

webhook-deliveries.json.description: Delivery attempts + retries + terminal outcomes for webhook events.

audits.json.description: Audit trail - every mutation with actor, before/after, ip/ua.

retention-policies.json.description: Retention policies per data class with redaction strategies.

sync-cursors.json.description: Per-device sync cursors for offline-first mobile clients.

sync-queue.json.description: Local change queue awaiting server push.

people.json.description: Central person registry - the Academorix ID + cross-tenant links + consent status.

staff.json.description: Internal staff profiles - employment, pay, contracts, status.

staff-pay-rates.json.description: Salary / hourly / per-session pay rates per staff.

staff-bonuses.json.description: Staff bonuses - win, retention, referral, sign-on.

staff-transfers.json.description: Staff role/branch/tenant transfers with append-only history.

certifications.json.description: Canonical staff certifications and licences with expiry status.

expenses.json.description: Expenses with attached receipts (one-time and recurring).

payroll-lines.json.description: Per-staff payroll lines aggregating base + hours/sessions + bonuses.

approval-tasks.json.description: Polymorphic approval queue - refunds, transfers, matches, attendance, link requests, registrations.

reception-visits.json.description: Front-desk visit log - walk-ins, drop-offs, deliveries, contractors, trials, tours.

day-passes.json.description: Day-pass access grants with lifecycle states.

ai-runs.json.description: AI model invocations with tokens, cost, latency, status.

ai-tool-calls.json.description: Tool calls per AI run with args hash + result summary + RBAC scope proof.

ai-embeddings.json.description: Vector store index - drills, coach notes, documents, scouting reports, announcements.

features.json.description: Feature flag definitions and rollout metadata.

feature-kill-switches.json.description: Emergency kill switches for critical features.

sports.json.description: The shared code-catalogue of sport configs (terminology, capabilities, scoring, tactical config).

tenant-sports.json.description: Per-tenant sport enablement + terminology overrides + active attribute subset.

formations.json.description: Formation templates (4-4-2, court zones, swim lanes).

seasons.json.description: Seasons with lifecycle (upcoming to active to closed to archived).

registration-windows.json.description: Registration windows per season with open/close.

age-cutoff-rules.json.description: Age cut-off rules per season, sport, and age group.

athlete-guardians.json.description: Guardian links to athletes with consent flags and order.

athlete-enrollments.json.description: Athlete enrollments - per sport, team, season, with attribute values.

athlete-transfers.json.description: Athlete transfers between team/branch/academy with history.

coaches.json.description: Sports-domain coach records - sports, certs (denormalized display view), availability.

coach-assignments.json.description: Coach to team assignments with role.

coach-availability.json.description: Coach availability slots for private-session matching.

coach-notes.json.description: Coach notes per athlete with visibility flags.

registrations.json.description: Registration form submissions through lead to trial to offered to enrolled.

waitlist-entries.json.description: Waitlist positions when a squad is full.

events.json.description: Schedulable activities across sports (training / match / session / festival).

event-invitations.json.description: Invitations tied to events with per-athlete RSVP state.

event-teams.json.description: Multi-team event participants (for festivals and multi-team fixtures).

event-reminders.json.description: Scheduled reminders for events (24h/2h/on-start) with channel routing.

calendar-subscriptions.json.description: iCal / Google Calendar subscriptions per user.

training-sessions.json.description: Training sessions and recurrence - one-off, RRULE, cancelled with reason.

match-squad.json.description: Match squad entries - who is picked, on the bench, starting XI.

match-results.json.description: Match results - scores per period, MOTM, scorers/assists, cards.

opponent-logos.json.description: Opponent-logo cache keyed by normalized name for reuse.

private-sessions.json.description: Private one-on-one coaching sessions with scheduled/completed/no_show/cancelled states.

session-credits.json.description: Session-credit ledger - pack purchase, consumption, adjustment.

packs.json.description: Session pack definitions (buy 10, consume per session).

attendance.json.description: Per-athlete attendance records with manual/QR/NFC/self-check-in methods.

attendance-submissions.json.description: Batch attendance submissions with review workflow (draft/submitted/confirmed/rejected).

facilities.json.description: Bookable resources - pitches, courts, pools, halls with capacity and hours.

resource-bookings.json.description: Bookings tying activities to resources with conflict detection.

credentials.json.description: NFC/RFID wristbands and cards linked to members with lifecycle states.

gates.json.description: Gates / readers per branch with active/maintenance/offline states.

checkin-logs.json.description: Raw check-in events (UID + gate + timestamp) written by NFC readers.

assessment-records.json.description: Skill assessment records - card_type (fifa_card/radar/time_trial), values, overall, rank.

test-batteries.json.description: Fitness-test battery definitions (sprint_40m, VO2, vertical_jump, etc.).

test-results.json.description: Test results per athlete + battery with percentiles.

medical-records.json.description: Baseline medical records - allergies, medications, conditions, emergency contact.

injuries.json.description: Injuries with lifecycle (reported to under_treatment to recovering to cleared).

treatments.json.description: Treatment sessions per injury (physio, imaging, strength program).

development-pathways.json.description: Talent pathways per sport (Foundation to Youth to Pre-Academy to Elite; Junior to Senior; Coach CPD).

pathway-stages.json.description: Stages within pathways with promotion criteria.

scouting-reports.json.description: Scouting reports on trialists and existing athletes.

drills.json.description: Drill library - passing, finishing, defending, technique, tactical, physical.

session-plans.json.description: Session plans composed of ordered drill items.

curriculum-weeks.json.description: Weekly themes and session plans within a curriculum.

safeguarding-incidents.json.description: Safeguarding incidents - welfare, facility_safety, privacy. Restricted RBAC.

consents.json.description: Audited consent register - photo, medical, transport, data share.

policy-acknowledgements.json.description: Staff policy sign-offs - acknowledged / pending / overdue / superseded.

award-types.json.description: Award type catalogue - MOTM, attendance streak, tournament winner.

awards.json.description: Granted awards to athletes with evidence.

certificates.json.description: Rendered PDF certificates issued to athletes.

competition-fixtures.json.description: Individual fixtures within a competition (linked to matches when realized).

standing-rows.json.description: League standings - rank, W/D/L, goal diff, form array.

messages.json.description: Messages within conversations with attachments and read receipts.

invoices.json.description: Invoices across sources: enrollment, membership, private-session, pack, adhoc. Full lifecycle.

invoice-reminders.json.description: Dunning reminder sequence for overdue invoices.

payments.json.description: Payment attempts - succeeded, failed, partially_refunded, refunded.

payment-methods.json.description: Saved payment methods per payer - cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, expired, needs_reauth.

credit-memos.json.description: Credit memos with applied_history and lifecycle states (open/settled/expired/void).

transactions.json.description: Immutable ledger with parent_transaction_id lineage across the full charge/refund/chargeback/credit chain.

sibling-discount-rules.json.description: Sibling / family discount rules evaluated at invoice generation.

tenant-payment-accounts.json.description: Stripe Connect / Paddle payment accounts per tenant with verification state.

memberships.json.description: Family memberships - one per child, one payer. States: trialing/active/past_due/paused/canceled.

membership-plans.json.description: Membership plan catalogue - monthly, termly, annual.

passes.json.description: Apple/Google Wallet passes - issued, active, revoked, updated.

report-definitions.json.description: Canned report definitions with parameters schema and scope.

leads.json.description: Sales pipeline leads with source attribution and stage.

public-site.json.description: Public pages, hero blocks, SEO metadata.
